block.header: =N(" miato tukuru isi no pibiki pa ame ni itari tuti sape yusure titipapa ga tameni moropito no tameni ")
=N(" miswoti amari putatu no katati yaswokusa to sodareru pito no pumisi atodokoro mareni mo aru kamo ")
=N(" yoki pito no masameni mikyemu miato sura wo ware pa emizute ipa ni werituku tama ni werituku ")
=N(" ko no miato ya yorodupikari wo panatiidasi moromoro sukupi watasitamapana sukupitamapana ")
=N(" ikanaru ya pito ni imase ka ipa no upe wo tuti to pumi nasi ato nokyeru ramu taputwoku mo aru ka ")
=N(" masurawo no susumi sakitati pumyeru ato wo mitutu sinopamu tadani apu madeni masani apu madeni ")
=N(" masurawo no pumiokyeru ato pa ipa no upe ni ima mo nokoreri mitutu sinopye to nagaku sinopye to ")
=N(" ko no miato wo tadunemotomete yoki pito no imasu kuni ni pa ware mo mawitemu moromoro wo wite ")
=N(" saka no miato ipa ni utusioki uyamapite noti no potoke ni yudurimaturamu sasagemausamu ")
=N(" kore no yo pa uturisaru tomo tokotobani sanokoriimase noti no yo no tame mata no yo no tame ")
=N(" masurawo no miato xxx ")
=N(" sakipapi no atuki tomokara mawitarite masameni mikyemu ato no tomosisa uresiku mo aru ka ")
=N(" wodinaki ya ware ni otoreru pito wo opomi watasamu tameto utusimatureri tukapematureri ")
=N(" saka no miato ipa ni utusioki yukimeguri uyamapimaturi wa ga yo pa wopemu ko no yo pa wopemu ")
=N(" kusurisi pa tune no mo aredo marapito no ima no kusurisi taputokarikyeri medasikarikyeri ")
=N(" ko no miato wo maparimatureba atonusi no tama no yosopopi omopoyuru kamo miru goto mo aru ka ")
=N(" opomiato wo mi ni kuru pito no inisi kata tiyo no tumi sape porobu to so ipu nozoku to zo kiku ")
=N(" pito no mwi pa egataku areba nori no ta no yosuka to nareri tutome moromoro susumye moromoro ")
=N(" yotu no pemi itutu no mono no atumareru kitanaki mwi woba itopisutu besi panaresutu besi ")
=N(" ikaduti no pikari no gotoki kore no mwi pa sini no opokimi tune ni tagupyeri odu bekarazu ya ")
=N(" xtuxxx xxxxpitaru xx no tani kusurisi motomu yoki pito motomu samasamu ga tameni ")
